violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Space observed between the door and door frame. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2023

Walk-in cooler observed with an ambient temperature of 45 degrees F. No TCS foods currently stored in this unit. TCS foods require temperature control at/below 41 degrees F. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit unless it maintains a temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
